review.title: Beautiful hotel and hosts
review.text: This hotel has the most beautiful setting on the French Riviera, and the hosts Emilie and Hugues could not be friendlier or more helpful—nothing was too much trouble. We had our 9-year-old daughter with us, and she felt right at home from the moment we arrived. The homemade breakfast was plentiful and delicious, a great way to start the day. We will definitely return.
